chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. D- 91 of 2017 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 11.01.2018 For orders on office objection For katcha peshi Mr. Muhammad Jehangir Shaikh, advocate for petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl.A.G. Respondent No.8 present in person and has filed Statement along with photostat copy of certain documents which is taken on record; copy whereof is supplied to the counsel for petitioner. Parties advocate have been heard. After arguing at some length, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition and submits that he would approach the Sessions Judge for redressal of his grievance. In view of above, this petition stands disposed of as withdrawn. However, the petitioner would be at liberty to file any appropriate proceedings before the competent forum, if he so desires and law permits. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
